visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a beige flat cap sits on a beige fabric sofa, looking directly at the camera with an excited expression. He is wearing a grey t-shirt with a blue beaver logo. The background is a plain white wall and a portion of the sofa. (2) The man raises his smartphone towards the camera, showing a digital invitation with an Apple logo filled with swirling colors. The scene cuts to a close-up of the screen overlay. (3) A full-screen graphic appears, displaying the Apple event invitation with the text 'Awe dropping' and details for September 9, 2025. The colors are vibrant with blue, yellow, and red swirls. (4) The camera cuts back to the man on the sofa who gestures enthusiastically with his hands as he speaks. Floating text bubbles and product names like 'iPhone 17' appear near him. (5) A graphic banner with social media handles and '3cTim哥' appears at the bottom. The man points towards the camera lens, smiling, then holds up his phone again before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 欸 老婆. (2) [Subtitle]: 我收到了! 蘋果發表會的邀請函. (3) [Subtitle]: 好讚 跟我們說的一模一樣. (4) [Variety]: Awe dropping. [Slogan]: Please join us in person for a special Apple Event at the Steve Jobs Theater in Apple Park. September 9, 2025 10:00 a.m. PT. (5) [Subtitle]: 就是台灣時間的9月10號凌晨一點鐘. (6) [Subtitle]: 那所以會發什麼? 欸 你沒有看我頻道. (7) [Variety]: Tim嫂沒看. [Subtitle]: 我頻道都有每月一爆. (8) [Subtitle]: 我沒有在看影片! 喔 好. (9) [Subtitle]: 一共呢 會有iPhone 17全系列. (10) [Slogan]: Apple Watch S11. (11) [Slogan]: Apple Watch Ultra 3. (12) [Subtitle]: 還有AirTag 2. (13) [Subtitle]: 那還有其他什麼商品呢 我還蠻期待的. (14) [Subtitle]: 但我們明天會有詳細的分析. (15) [Subtitle]: 鎖定一下 我們3cTim哥生活日常頻道. (16) [Logo]: 3cTim哥 生活日常頻道. (17) [Subtitle]: 我們第一時間 會給大家所有的最新訊息喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator visible throughout the video on the sofa.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male with glasses, wearing a beige and brown flat cap and a grey Roots brand t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting featuring a white fabric sofa and a plain, light-colored wall, typical of a home living room.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male voice opens with a greeting, accompanied by an upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic guitar and light percussion track. The acoustics are clean with a bright spectral profile. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect underscores the mention of an invitation. The male speaker's pitch remains high and varied, showing clear enthusiasm. (3) A digital 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the background music maintains a consistent, major-mode rhythm. (4) An off-screen female voice speaks briefly with a playful tone, followed by the insertion of a canned laughter sound effect. The BGM remains steady in the background. (5) The male speaker delivers a fast-paced list of products, with each item emphasized by subtle percussive pops in the audio. (6) The video concludes with a friendly call-to-action; the BGM gradually fades down in volume as the final words are spoken.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a celebratory announcement and teaser for the upcoming Apple event. The creator shares his excitement about receiving the official invitation and provides a quick summary of rumored products to build anticipation among his audience, ultimately encouraging them to follow his channel for deeper analysis.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-arousal vocal delivery and variety-show editing tropes to maximize viewer engagement in a short-form format.
